title: acinos multiflorus
intro: Acinos multiflorus, also known as Thymus multiflorus or Creeping Thyme, is a low-growing, spreading perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, which are attributed to its essential oils. The health benefits of Acinos multiflorus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, relieve respiratory problems, and act as an antimicrobial agent. Acinos multiflorus can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in traditional medicine and culinary applications.
